items.title: Amazing game!!
items.summary:
This game is an absolute gem! I can’t believe it’s not more well-known. The art and music are gorgeous, the narrative is beautifully written and delightfully dark, and the gacha system is surprisingly generous—only five pulls for a “5-star”! The deckbuilding and roguelike mechanics are top-notch as well.

Best of all, it’s available on both PC and mobile, with cross-save support. I can play on my PC during work breaks, then pick it up right where I left off on my phone in bed. Highly recommended!

Would love a Nintendo Switch version as well 😁
items.author: MayraGandra
